markets.rules_primary: If the temperature recorded at Central Park, New York City for Jun 28, 2026 5 PM EDT as reported by The Weather Company (for coordinates KNYC), is above 87.99°, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
The official, final value for this market is the temperature reported by the The Weather Company, not any other weather service.
NWS Climatological Reports, Google Weather, etc. may be useful references, but are not authoritative for resolution.
Preliminary Weather Company data may be subject to rounding and conversion differences from the final reported value.
Use caution when interpreting preliminary Weather Company readings.
markets.subtitle: -1° or below
markets.title: Will the temp in New York City be above 87.99° on Jun 28, 2026 at 5pm EDT?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Willy Adames records 3+ hits in the Atlanta vs San Francisco professional baseball game originally scheduled for Jun 28, 2026 at 4:05 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Willy Adames is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Willy Adames starts the game but does not record a plate appearance, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Willy Adames is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the fair market price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If Willy Adames is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on hits recorded.
markets.title: Willy Adames: 3+ hits?

markets.rules_primary: If Eli White records 2+ hits in the Atlanta vs San Francisco professional baseball game originally scheduled for Jun 28, 2026 at 4:05 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Eli White is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Eli White starts the game but does not record a plate appearance, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Eli White is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the fair market price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If Eli White is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on hits recorded.
